Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 298 upvotes, 54 comments
  2. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. The future of Amazon coders is the present of Amazon warehouse workers 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 318 upvotes, 95 comments
  5. Canopy Height Maps v2 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 155 upvotes, 50 comments
  7. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 342 upvotes, 142 comments
  8. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 312 upvotes, 133 comments
  9. Why I love FreeBSD 352 upvotes, 164 comments
  10. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 32 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 660 upvotes, 345 comments
  12. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 202 upvotes, 98 comments
  13. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 231 upvotes, 114 comments
  14. On The Need For Understanding 86 upvotes, 37 comments
  15. Home Assistant waters my plants 252 upvotes, 131 comments
  16. Language Model Teams as Distrbuted Systems 71 upvotes, 32 comments
  17. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1344 upvotes, 882 comments
  18. Kona EV Hacking 120 upvotes, 68 comments
  19. Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games 166 upvotes, 103 comments
  20. Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI 128 upvotes, 79 comments
  21. US commercial insurers pay 254% of Medicare for the same hospital procedures 226 upvotes, 164 comments
  22. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 59 upvotes, 35 comments
  23. Starlink Mini as a failover 198 upvotes, 168 comments
  24. Show HN: Trackm, a personal finance web app 20 upvotes, 10 comments
  25. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 65 upvotes, 48 comments
  26. Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP 122 upvotes, 105 comments
  27. Show HN: GitClassic.com, a fast, lightweight GitHub thin client (pages <14KB) 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 91 upvotes, 118 comments
  29. AirPods Max 2 212 upvotes, 381 comments
